title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Vertex Pharmaceuticals using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what VRTX is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-eotenzz6>
Vertex dominates the cystic fibrosis (CF) market, providing highly predictable and growing cash flows. Revenue grew 8.9% in 2025 and ~11% in 2024. FCF has been lumpy due to acquisitions (like the drop in 2024), but underlying operations support a 10% annualized growth rate over the next five years.
